calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-08-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-15-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: April 15, 2008

This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

J. Michael Phelps, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Donald L. Porter, who was placed under oath and testified. No appearance by plaintiff Reba S. Porter.
No appearance by defendants Brenda Jones, Johnny A. Jones, Erica Jones or All Persons Claiming Any Legal or Equitable Right, Title, Estate, Lien, or Interest in the Real Property Described in the Complaint Herein Adverse to Plaintiffs' Title or Any Cloud on Plaintiffs' Title Thereto.

Default entered against defendants on February 14, 2008.
Doe defendants dismissed today, April 15, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiffs Donald L. Porter and Reba S. Porter, and against the Defaulted Defendants Brenda Jones, Johnny A. Jones, Erica Jones or All Persons Claiming Any Legal or Equitable Right, Title, Estate, Lien, or Interest in the Real Property Described in the Complaint Herein Adverse to Plaintiffs' Title or Any Cloud on Plaintiffs' Title Thereto.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
